Motion To Compel Discovery From Plaintiff-Cross-Defendant Robert Dorner, Individually And Dba Extra Care Contractor And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Marc L. Lichtenberg, esq. (707-637-5373) for Plaintiff.
Barry K. Tagawa, esq. (415-951-8600) for Defendant.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
